caveats: inputs.ai_replaceable_share: Provided 5411 mix is a law-office proxy, not a 541199 occupation census.
inputs.ai_replaceable_share: Scored subsegment selection is a judgment.
inputs.pi_dist: Platform scale differs from local operator economics.
inputs.pi_moat: Patent registration is terminal/subsegment protection, not a blanket code moat.
inputs.t50_years: Independent local operators may lag LegalZoom; this is a dominant-segment estimate.
inputs.current_adoption_pct: No NAICS adoption census reopened.
inputs.historical_analogs: Electronic filing does not itself replace service of process.
inputs.owners_60plus_pct.succession_shortage_documented: Do not infer from ABC Legal's acquisition page.
inputs.buy_mult: Not an observed transaction multiple.
inputs.exit_mult: No direct size-tier exits reopened.
inputs.pricing_structure: Prices vary by legal specialty and geography.

q.rationale: The existing v3 distribution-retention × moat-retention judgment is reused as a bounded Stage 1 commercial-retention proxy.

leaves.rationale: Predeclared bounded demand/operator row for the inherited v3 terminal class; unknown classes remain missing.

e.rationale: Global eligible-union share; heterogeneous records use the predeclared wider/lower class-count row.

n.detail: margin 0.1565 (margins.json[54]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Business & Consumer Services EBITDA/Sales 15.65%); revenue/employee $243,973 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 541199); class <5: 4,123 firms, avg revenue/firm $289,622 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $45,326 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 452 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,226,542 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $191,954 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 213 firms, avg revenue/firm $2,658,155 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $416,001 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 141 firms, avg revenue/firm $7,534,603 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $1,179,165 -> IN $1-10M band; class 100-499: 33 firms, avg revenue/firm $24,876,091 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $3,893,108 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 18 firms, avg revenue/firm $188,648,444 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $29,523,482 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 174

s5.rationale: Fixed transform of the disclosed v3 owner-age range into five-year qualifying control-transfer propensity.

a.rationale: Document assembly and dispatch are highly exposed, physical service is not, and patent practice retains a registration requirement.

l.detail: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 541199 ($3,939,934,593) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 541199 ($7,593,656,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

rho.rationale: Fixed outcome-blind transform of the v3 t50 adoption estimate, widened by the declared bridge error.

source_review.summary: Mechanics and exact-artifact checks pass. The heterogeneous 541199 thesis remains useful and the five registered sources support its directional mechanisms, but publication must retain all 13 authored caveats concerning the parent-industry role proxy, dominant-subsegment judgment, market-wide adoption, buyer count, multiples, and other disclosed uncertainty.

sources.title: LegalZoom 2025 Form 10-K
sources.what_it_supports: LegalZoom states AI-enabled workflow automates legal/compliance processes and supports transparent flat-fee products; 65% of 2025 revenue was subscriptions.

sources.title: ABC Legal: selling a process-serving business
sources.what_it_supports: ABC Legal publicly describes an acquisition process for process-serving businesses.

sources.title: U.S. Courts CM/ECF FAQ
sources.what_it_supports: Federal courts support electronic filing and consensual electronic service of documents; rules cited do not apply to service of process.

sources.title: USPTO Patent Practitioner Home Page
sources.what_it_supports: USPTO lists 53,471 active patent practitioners, including 14,609 agents, and maintains a current roster.

sources.title: ABC Legal Service of Process pricing
sources.what_it_supports: ABC Legal reports per-service pricing of $75–$145 depending on geography and charges per address/entity/case.
